summary: Full-stack testing of DPM UB 2026 (Parlemen Pilar Karsa) — Indonesian student parliament site. Backend: 10/10 pytest cases passed (root, aspirasi CRUD, validation, stats, limit guard). Frontend: complete e2e flow validated — Home loads with header/pill nav/CTA, Hero with blended Rektorat (no white box), 5 Pilar cards with BAB 2 PASAL 4 references, Pengawasan dashboard + Aspirasi preview, footer, modal form submission (POST /api/aspirasi -> 201, success toast, modal closes), empty-form validation, 404 routing for /about, /legislasi, /aspirasi, and arbitrary paths, 'Kembali ke Beranda' navigation. Zero issues found.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('shutdown') — consider migrating to lifespan context manager (low priority).
AspirasiModal close-on-success is fine, but consider also calling onOpenChange(false) before resetting form to avoid a brief flash of empty state if animation lingers (cosmetic).
Aspirasi list endpoint has no pagination skip/offset; only limit. For future scale, add skip parameter.
Data model lacks explicit unique constraint on (nim, judul) — duplicate submissions possible. Consider rate limiting or dedupe key for production.
GET /api/aspirasi is currently public (no auth). If sensitive, add admin guard before launch.
test_credentials: N/A — no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: Created 2 TEST_-prefixed aspirasi documents in MongoDB via API during pytest run; they remain in DB (no cleanup endpoint exists). Visible to admin via GET /api/aspirasi.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_dpm_ub_api.py is reusable. It uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env. All key UI elements have data-testid kebab-case (site-header, brand-link, nav-{home,about,legislasi,aspirasi}, header-cta-aspirasi, hero-section, hero-rektorat, pilar-card-{0..4}, pengawasan-preview, aspirasi-preview, aspirasi-modal, aspirasi-input-{nama,nim,fakultas,kategori,judul,isi}, aspirasi-submit-button, not-found-page, 404-back-home, 404-cta-aspirasi). Hero rektorat renders cleanly with no white background — image is a -removebg PNG.
